services.name: MCP audit Langfuse sink
backups: PBS exclude baseline and host backup policy

resource_context.notes: Terraform LXC envelope records requested host resources.

services.name: MCP NATS cluster
storage: JetStream state on mcp-nats LXC hosts

resource_context.notes: Terraform LXC envelope records requested host resources.

migration.rationale: Already an LXC audit-plane service and not part of Kubernetes migration triage.

services.notes: Terraform owns LXC envelope; NixOS owns service convergence.
